applicability_notes: Full (all-dims) max reduction: torch.max(x) -> ttnn.max(x). When keepdim=True the golden expands to torch.max(x, dim=tuple(range(rank)), keepdim=True); ttnn.max with dim=None handles both.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: generic test tensors, tile-aligned via fill_implicit_tile_padding
placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) default interleaved DRAM, ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding then ttnn.max(input_tensor)
